runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 6 on March 17 over 390m at this track behind Canya Jelly Bean beaten 8 lengths (22.58). Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Form has been a bit hot and cold of late. Fair effort two starts back finished 5th on March 19 over 350m at Q Straight behind Aces Up Here beaten 6 lengths (19.67) in a Grade 6. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.
